series_metadata.series_title: Ohio State Highway Patrol (OSHP) Employee Medical Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains medical records related to all OSHP troopers, which may include, but is not limited to, medical histories; medical test results; informed consent/release forms; health screening questionnaires; medical, psychological, and physical fitness evaluations; physical fitness plans; medical referrals; medical records from external sources; medication lists; medical deferral requests; and supporting documentation. This series also contains medical histories for OSHP civilian employees through 2012. Note: Beginning in 2013, medical histories for OSHP civilian employees are retained in accordance with SAN 760-1443, "Employee Benefits and Medical History Files" SAN 760-1443.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Records are be retained current, from date of separation. Records related OSHP civilian employees are be retained current, 7 years from date of separation. Records may be transferred ODPS Record Center retention. Record may be retained electronically in HR Intellinetics System. If record is imaged and retained electronically, paper may be destroyed as soon as scan is confirmed and validated. ; Electronic: If retained electronically, records are retained in HR''s Intellinetics System. Records related OSHP troopers are be retained current, from date of separation. Records related OSHP civilians are be retained current, 7 years from date of separation
